features: PACK OF 50 SNAP CLIPS; You will receive 50 assorted hair clips
CUTE GIFT IDEA; Girls will love to receive these as a gift, as part of a party game such as lucky dip
COMFORTABLE; Lightweight clips that will sit comfortably in hair for hours
SAFTEY FIRST; Please ensure these clips are kept away from young children due to small parts
description: Product Description Girls will love these colourful clips that are perfect for adding a POP of colour to hair or to keep hair out of faces and eyes! TRIXES 50PC Hair Clip Slides Our hair slide clips are perfect for everyday use and can hold both thicker hair and smaller strands of hair in place for long periods. 50PC Multi-pack coloured hair clip Slides Our clips feature an array of bright colours, patterns and designs, girls are sure to find their favourite and colour co-ordinate them with their outfits and school Uniforms! Cute Hair Accessory! The popular patterns with bright colours fit various kinds of outfits, hair Colours and hairstyles. They are suitable for short, medium and long hair lengths as well as fine and thicker hair types. These clips are great for holding flyaway strands of hair when its up in a ponytail. Strong and Durable! Our clips feature an array of bright colours, designs and patterns, girls are sure to find their favourite and colour co-ordinate them with their outfits and school Uniforms. Comes with the popular size 4.9cm , a perfect snap hair clip set for Kids, Teens and women. Hair Accessory Top Picks... Brunette Bombshell Wig Blonde Bombshell Wig 4PC Hair Dye Kit Hair Paddle Brush Hair Scrunchies 20PC Durable High Quality Hair Accessories Hair Dye Wig
